overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses covered sidewalks, crosses intersections with towering glass buildings, and enters a narrow service alley with intense red lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the overpass, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning overhead with support columns
small food vendor with glowing blue and purple neon awning signage
low orange concrete dividers separating sidewalk from street
tall street lamp casting bright white light onto wet pavement
rectangular planter box containing palm trees and greenery

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass. Neon signs from a food stall glow on the right while street lamps illuminate the misty air. The environment is semi-covered with sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with tall commercial towers

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing the night sky and towering glass skyscrapers against the dark clouds
traffic light changes from red to green allowing vehicles to proceed

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the massive buildings, then continuing across the street

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching the intersection slowly

entered.detail: massive multi-story glass and steel office tower with illuminated windows
giant vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
traffic signal showing red then green light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide open intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive scale of the buildings and digital billboards overhead. The traffic light changes as the character crosses the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with closed storefronts and neon signage

events.description: character turns right at the corner following the sidewalk past parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street passing various storefronts and turning corners through the urban environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal roll-down security shutters covering shop fronts with graffiti tags
multiple illuminated digital billboards and advertisement displays on building walls
white commercial van parked along the curb
street sign reading 'Cartwright' mounted on black pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial city street lined with closed storefronts and metal shutters. Digital advertising screens glow on the buildings while the character passes parked vehicles and turns corners under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with red neon lighting

events.description: character enters narrow alleyway with intense red ambient lighting and graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow red-lit alleyway, exploring the enclosed corridor

entered.detail: intense red neon tube lights mounted along both walls of the narrow corridor
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
corrugated metal security door with graffiti painted on surface
discarded cardboard boxes and debris piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow service alley illuminated by intense red neon lights. The enclosed space features graffiti-covered concrete walls, closed metal shutters, and scattered debris. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the open city street to this claustrophobic corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city that shifts from wide, neon-lit thoroughfares into a claustrophobic industrial alley. It begins with the character walking along a slick sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass, where glowing food stalls and street lamps pierce through the misty air. As the character emerges from the cover of the overpass, the scene opens into a massive intersection where the camera tilts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and shimmering digital billboards. The movement then carries the character past closed storefronts and parked vehicles along a commercial street before turning back under the highway structure. Finally, the environment narrows sharply as the character enters a service alley, where the open city light is replaced by intense red neon reflecting off graffiti-covered concrete walls and scattered debris.
